_comment: Verify fixture for the select_confident Run Code node — the `inputs` dict passed to main(). `preds` is a representative slice of pseudo_label's output (one {id,label,confidence} per pooled example) with a genuine softmax-confidence spread like a REAL round (RTX 3060, scripts/run_loop_local.py). With threshold 0.95 exactly two predictions clear the bar, so verifying doubles as a correctness check: batch == [pool-0481, pool-1207] (confidence-desc), new_confident == 2.
